mapper.select:
SELECT id, tnk_meter_tag, tnk_meter_dev, tnk_meter_purp, tnk_meter_loop, tnk_meter_name, tnk_meter_model, tnk_meter_spec, tnk_meter_range, tnk_meter_manu, tnk_meter_meas, tnk_meter_med_proc, tnk_meter_med_stat, tnk_meter_press, tnk_meter_temp, tnk_meter_nom_dia, tnk_meter_fault_press, tnk_meter_leak_stat, tnk_meter_leak_lv, tnk_meter_chk_time, tnk_meter_chk_cycle, tnk_meter_factory_no, tnk_meter_remark, status, dv_type FROM tnk_meter
AND tnk_meter_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.tnkMeterTag}, '%')
AND status = #{queryParams.status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.dvType}, '%')

SELECT tnk_meter_tag, tnk_meter_dev, tnk_meter_purp, tnk_meter_loop, tnk_meter_name, tnk_meter_model, tnk_meter_spec, tnk_meter_range, tnk_meter_manu, tnk_meter_meas, tnk_meter_med_proc, tnk_meter_med_stat, tnk_meter_press, tnk_meter_temp, tnk_meter_nom_dia, tnk_meter_fault_press, tnk_meter_leak_stat, tnk_meter_leak_lv, tnk_meter_chk_time, tnk_meter_chk_cycle, tnk_meter_factory_no, tnk_meter_remark, status, dv_type FROM tnk_meter
AND tnk_meter_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tnkMeterTag}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND dv_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dvType}, '%')
